titleStmt.title: SII 17.445: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 445. (A.R. No. 415 of 1904.) VĒDĀRAṆYAM, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the central shrine in the Vēdāraṇyēśvara temple.
The details of date viz. Mīṉa śu. 5, Thursday, Rōhiṇī correspond to 1182 A.D., March 11.

This records the gift of 150 kāśu of gold for a perpetual lamp to the deity in the Tirumaṟaikkāḍu temple, in Kuṉṟūr-nāḍu, a sub-division of Umbaḷa-nāḍu by Guṇamalaippāḍi-uḍaiyāṉ Gaṅgaikoṇḍāṉ Rājarājadēva alias Kottappichchōḻar. The Śivabrāhmaṇas received the money and undertook to supply one nāḻi of ghee by the standard measure vēdavaṉa-nāyakan, out of the interest on the endowed amount.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī kulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟkku yāṇṭu nā
lāvatu miṉanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu pañcamiyum viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa
Urocaṇi nāḷ Umpaḷa nāṭṭu kuṉṟūr nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirumaṟaikkāṭuṭaiyārkku cu
ttamalli vaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇik kūṟṟattu kuṇamalaippāṭi Uṭaiyāṉ kaṅkai ko
ṇṭāṉ Irācarācatevarāṉa kottappic coḻar cantarātittavaṟku cel
la vaitta tiruṉantāviḷakku Onṟukku Ikkoyiṟ civappirāmaṇakkāṇi Uṭai
ya kemutaman Umaiyāḻvāṉ Ātittatevaṉāṉa tirumaṟaikkāṭu paṭṭaṉum Iva
ṉ tampi kaṅkaikoṇṭāṉāṉa Aṇṭamuṟa nimirntapaṭṭaṉum Ikkottirattu U
ṭaiyāṉ maruntāṉa nāyakartevapaṭṭaṉum Ikkottirattu Arikaṇṭa tevaṉ Uyyakko
ṇṭānāṉa Irācarācapaṭṭaṉum Ikkottirattu Arikaṇṭatevaṉ Āḷuṭaiyāṉ māṉikka
kūttaṉum Ikkottirattu Arikaṇṭatevaṉ Ātittatevaṉāṉa Etirilicoḻapaṭṭaṉum
Ikkottirattu vetavaṉamuṭaiyāṉ piḷḷānāṉa vikkirama coḻapaṭṭaṉum Ik
kottirattu Ātittaṉ Antiyarkālaketiyāṉa kuṉṟūrnāṭṭu paṭṭaṉum Ikkottirat
tu tevaṉ perumānāṉa nāṟpatteṇṇāyira paṭṭaṉum Ikkottirattu tirumaṟaikkāṭṭu Uṭaiyā
ṉ perumānāṉa kulottuṅkacoḻapaṭṭaṉum Āttiraiyaṉ tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyāṉ pe
rumānāṉa vetavaṉanāyaka paṭṭaṉum Omayintaṉ muttāṉ tevanāna Ālāla cunta
rapaṭṭaṉum pārattuvāci piccaṉ perumānāṉa paḻiyañcipaṭṭaṉum Ikkottirattu pa
ñcanetip piranāṉa Ātittapaṭṭaṉum Ikkottirattu tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ caṅ
kaānāṉa tirumaṟaikkāṭu paṇṭitaṉum Ivvaṉaivomu muḷḷiṭṭu maṟṟu muppatu vaṭṭattuk kā
ṇi Uṭaiya civappirāmaṇarom Ikkuṇamalaippāṭi Uṭaiyār kaṅkaikoṇṭār Irāca
rāca tevarāṉa kottappiccoḻaṉ pakkal poṉkoṇṭu poliyūṭṭāka nāṅkaḷ kaikko
ṇṭa Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu 1[ 5 10m] Ikkācu nūṟṟaimpatum kaikkoṇṭu mutal niṟka kaṭavatāka
vum policaikku vetavaṉa nāyakanāle nittam Uḻakku neyyāka vanta neyyai Aḷantu
tiruvaṇukkaṉ tiruviḷakkāka santirātittavaṟ śāśvatamāka Erikkakaṭavomāka sammatit
tu Ikkācu tūṟṟaimpatuṅ kaikkoṇṭu Ivvaṉaivom Upaiyattiṭṭu kuṭuttom
Ivvaṉaivom—
Digital edition of SII 17.445 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
